commands.review_summary:
The PR adds opt-in Telegram Guest Mode handling for guest_message updates, isolated guest sessions, answerGuestQuery delivery, Telegram config/schema/docs updates, and regression tests.

PR surface: Source +669, Tests +851, Docs +11, Generated 0. Total +1531 across 27 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking review finding: source inspection shows guest turns hard-code `resolveDefaultAgentId` before `routeAgentIdOverride`, while current routing supports account/channel bindings. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is one concrete repair: derive guest agent routing from existing account/channel bindings while preserving guest session isolation from group peer bindings.
